title: Fundamentals of Physics
description: Test your knowledge of the basic laws of physics, mechanics, and thermodynamics.

title: Space and the Universe
description: What do you know about black holes, galaxies, the solar system, and the Big Bang?

title: Quantum Mechanics for Beginners
description: Schrödinger's cat, entanglement, and basic concepts of the microworld.

title: Algebra: Level 1
description: Basic equations, fractions, percentages, and simple mathematical operations.

title: Higher Mathematics
description: Integrals, derivatives, and matrices. Only for true experts.

title: Logic and Probability
description: Problems in logic, combinatorics, and probability theory.

title: The Periodic Table
description: How well do you navigate chemical elements and their properties?

title: Human Anatomy
description: Body structure, organs, circulatory systems, and the nervous system.

title: Cell Biology
description: Mitochondria, DNA, RNA, and cell division processes.

title: World Geography
description: Capitals, flags, mountains, and oceans. General knowledge.
